title: CRM
description: API mod that provides various utilities for using CometRenderer within Minecraft.
body:
CRM (CometRenderer Mod) is a library that provides various utilities for using CometRenderer within Minecraft.

## Whats CometRenderer?
CometRenderer is an optimized, customized and full independent rendering system for OpenGL. This provides a wide range of tools that can be used to easily render your projects.

In the context of Minecraft, its main feature is that over 80% of all rendering code will be identical for all versions of Minecraft for which there is a CRM. This means that when you port your mod from one Minecraft version to another, almost all of the rendering-related code will remain identical.

## Documentation
The project has [documentation](https://ferra13671-dev.gitbook.io/projects/main/cometrenderer-documentation/crm/about) that contains various information about using CometRenderer and CRM.

## FAQ
### Can it replace Sodium or Optifine?
No. CRM provides an various utilities for using CometRenderer in Minecraft, without changing Minecraft's rendering.
### Does this library have a Forge version?
No. I don't currently have any plans to port it to Forge, but I might do so in the future.
